Breed Improved v0.1.0 — Manual Installation

Supported CK3 version: 1.19.*
Languages: English and Simplified Chinese

1. Extract MyCK3Mod.mod and the MyCK3Mod directory into the CK3 user mod
   directory used by your launcher.
2. Open the extracted MyCK3Mod.mod file.
3. Replace <LOCAL_MOD_PATH> with the absolute path to the extracted MyCK3Mod
   directory. Use forward slashes in that path.
4. Keep descriptor.mod inside the MyCK3Mod directory.
5. Enable Breed Improved in a CK3 playset.

The launcher template intentionally does not contain a machine-specific path.
Do not add a Workshop ID before the first Steam Workshop upload assigns one.

Removal
-------
Disable Breed Improved in the launcher, then remove MyCK3Mod.mod and the
MyCK3Mod directory if desired. Back up important saves first. Removing the mod
does not provide a rollback for consequences already stored in a save.

Breed Improved performs no automatic background scans or recurring cleanup.
